meta.name: Cron Expression Generator
meta.description: Build five-field cron expressions with visual controls, presets, and upcoming run previews.

output.title: Cron expression
output.description: Copy the generated five-field expression into a scheduler that uses standard minute hour day month weekday syntax.
output.noteDescription: When both day of month and day of week are restricted, many cron implementations run when either field matches. Check your scheduler's documentation before relying on that combination.

presets.title: Quick presets
presets.description: Start from common schedules, then adjust any field below.

fields.title: Configure fields
fields.description: Each row controls one cron field. Choose every value, an interval, specific values, or an inclusive range.
fields.specificEmpty: No values selected; this field falls back to every value.

descriptions.minute: Choose which minutes in each matching hour may run.
descriptions.hour: Choose which hours in each matching day may run.
descriptions.dayOfMonth: Choose matching calendar days from 1 through 31.
descriptions.dayOfWeek: Choose matching weekdays, with Sunday represented as 0.

nextRuns.title: Next runs
nextRuns.description: Preview the next matching local times for the generated expression.
nextRuns.emptyDescription: This can happen with impossible combinations such as day 31 in February. Adjust the day or month field.
